prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.6 kg; Height 155.7 cm; BMI 25.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 193mg/dL; 9 months ago 204mg/dL; 6 months ago 200mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.9kg; 9 months ago 57.3kg; 6 months ago 57.8kg; 3 months ago 59.7kg; current 60.6kg), Height (12 months ago 155.7cm; 9 months ago 155.7cm; 6 months ago 155.7cm; 3 months ago 155.7cm; current 155.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 143mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 143mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 29U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 25U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 293mg/g; 9 months ago 205mg/g; 6 months ago 193mg/g; 3 months ago 191mg/g; current 202mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 69mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 70mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 33mg/dL; 9 months ago 34mg/dL; 6 months ago 33mg/dL; 3 months ago 34mg/dL; current 35mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 164mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 159mg/dL; 3 months ago 145mg/dL; current 154mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
